channel.title: +गौडीयाः on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website
channel.description: Recent content in +गौडीयाः on विश्वासस्य जालक्षेत्रम् Vishvas's website

item.title: 2026-02-17 Nitya karma abandonment
item.description:
Source: TW

Videos

Source: TW

gauDIya vaiShNavas & nitya karma, varNa-Ashrama-dharma, jIva-gosvAmI, baladeva, kRShNa, jaisingh 2

विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

00:00 - A noble gauDIya vaiShNava mlechCha family 01:36 - nitya-naimittika-karma commitment question 02:45 - Credits and sources (not agreement, ofc) 03:45 - chaitanya, sanAtana-gosvAmI सनातन-गोस्वामी 1488–1558 04:50 - jIva-gosvAmI जीव-गोस्वामी 1513 – 1598 05:30 - bhAgavata-purANa primacy - natural commentary of brahma-sUtra-s, gauDIya vaiShNava mistake in focus. **** 07:55 - तावत् कर्माणि कुर्वीत - jIva-gosvAmI on the shAnkara shrIdhara-gosvAmI.
11:40 - भक्त्य्-आरम्भ एव तु स्वरूपत एव कर्म-त्यागः कर्तव्यः । - jIva. 12:45 - deliberate abandonment of nitya-karmas - बुद्धिपूर्वकता 13:50 - Exceptions - कथञ्चित् क्रियमाणम् अपि … 17:00 - Instructing नित्य-कर्म-त्याग to others. Degeneracy risk. 18:55 - Other exceptions 19:40 - Commentary (BP) opposing the original (BS)? A flaw. **** 20:55 - Unnecessary complexity of decision in abandoning karma - sign of misunderstanding **** 23:30 - विश्वनाथ-चक्रवर्ती 1626–1708 follows jIva 25:30 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa बलदेवः 1700–1793 **** 26:00 - jayasiMha 2/ sawai jaisingh, Arya company, rAmAnandi (?) tradition 27:30 - brahma-sUtra-govinda-bhAShya. baladeva’s dilemma 28:46 - baladeva’s hack - lokasangraha applies to all AshramI-s. 30:00 - अनभिभवं च दर्शयति ॥ ३.४.३५ - sUxmA-TIkA 31:50 - Covering a mistake with another 33:00 - Correction to jIva 33:40 - Good job in ensuring non-degeneracy. **** 35:00 - bhagavad-gItA charama-shloka commentary - confirmation 37:20 - kRShNa-deva-sArvabhauma कृष्णदेव-सार्वभौम-भट्टाचार्यः (1750) 38:15 - prameya-ratnAvalI commentary - आश्रमस्थः प्रतिष्ठितो लब्ध-महद्-आसनश् चेत् ॥ 41:00 - Modern gauDIya vaiShNava-s T kRShNa-dAsa parroting jIva gosvAmI **** 42:55 - hari-dAsa-bAbA hindI “translation” - suggests kAmya-karma-tyAga 44:45 - baladeva vidyAbhUShaNa camp - modern acceptance 46:40 - Conclusion, good wishes towards gauDIya vaiShNava victory.

item.title: GopAla-bhaTTa - facts vs stories
item.description:
• mangalam
  • Topic. Mainstream story vs facts vs better theory.
  • gopAla-bhaTTa intro. Counted among 6 gosvAmi-s of vRndAvan. Family shrine in shrIrangam. Continued regard by gauDIya-s - https://youtu.be/WlRKVl8mGbg https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qwqj0w0819E&t=134s
  • mainstream story about gopAla-bhaTTa. Narahari Cakravartin. abhaya-charaNa AC bhaktivedAntasvAmI prabhupAda.
  • “Under the wing” of rUpa and sanAtana.
  • Internal disputations - parents’ death? chaitanya alive? rAmAnujIya yati “prabodhAnanda-sarasvatI”? sannyAsa?
  • Supposed works - commentary on the Kṛṣṇa-karṇāmṛta (kRShNa-vallabhA), an earlier alankAra-shAstra commentary, Sat-kriyāsāra-dīpikā, hari-bhakti-vilAsa
  • ShaT-sandarbha contributions
  • Credible bits - Meeting chaitanya 1510 CE?, arrival in vRndAvana in mid 1530s post age 30.
  • pAncharAtra dIxA, basic rAmAnujIya education. consecration of temples.
  • sanAtana and rUpa - with tough muslim court political / admin background, abandon varNa-dharma, start an unorthodox religious movement in vRndAvana. chaitanya far away in puri.
  • colophon of kRShNa-karNAmRta commentary - श्री-द्राविड-हरिवंश-भट्टैक-चरण-शरण-श्री-गोपाल-भट्ट. Other AlankArika commentaries.
  • “vaiShNava smRti” hari-bhakti-vilAsa thrust on him by sanAtana. (hari-bhakti-vilAsaH/meta/authorship) Mans Broo comment. An open secret. “शिवे च परमेशाने विष्णौ च परमात्मनि । समबुद्ध्या प्रवर्त्तन्ते”
  • ShaT-sandarbha abandonment. Obscure vAdikesari-saumya-jAmAtR (ALagiya manavALa jIyar) cited. Sparse shrI-bhAShya 1.1, 2 citations in initial sandarbhas. (ShaT-sandarbhaH/meta/contributions)
  • jIva was made by rUpa and sanAtana to write it (“रूप-सनातनौ विलेखयतः”).
  • Lived for 20+ years after ShaT-sandarbha completion. Did not actively help or hinder jIva & co’s program.
  • respectful mentions of gopAla-bhaTTa by sanAtana and jIva, not as a helper. even shrIdhara-svAmI is glorified by gosvAmins. Liberal with vRddha-vaiShNava-s.
  • Rift with Kṛṣṇadāsa Kavirāja. Denied permission for inclusion to Kṛṣṇadāsa Kavirāja Gosvāmī (chaitanya-charitAmRta) as per Narahari Cakravartin in 18th CE. The latter’s kRShNakarNamRta commentary did not use his commentary.
  • Had students (one sent by jIva) and admirers in vRndAvana.
  • shrIvaiShNa-puNDra use by his parivAra.
  • Official story problems. द्राविड-हरिवंश-भट्टैक-चरण-शरण, Abandonment of sandarbhas, acknowldegement as non-sahAya by sanAtana and jIva. “prabodhAnanda-sarasvatI”. sannyAsa.
  • Sat-kriyāsāra-dīpikā foisting, shrAddha-non-performance. Counter-religion.
  • Story to better fit facts. Arrival. Disagreement with rUpa and sanAtana. (ShaT-sandarbhaH/meta/contributions)
  • Initial cooption. Building an unorthodox religious movement, but wanted to insert some heft from a progressively unwilling orthodox bhakta.
  • Wisening up, retirement. R & S recruit nephew jIva. gopAla not helping jIva and kRShNadAsa.
  • Good wishes for vaiShNava growth. Consecrations. Some archanA training.
  • Continued shrIvaiShNava affiliation. “Belonging” meaning. puNDra. tridaNDi-sannyAsa?
  • baladeva-vidyAbhUShaNa. mAdhva identity.
  • Feeback welcome.
